ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist performing the song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the song originated */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "song_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song in minutes and seconds */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song contains explicit content */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the song is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the song (out of 10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments about the song */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who did not find the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, reviewer, admin) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following another user */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follow relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist the song belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song in the playlist */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended song */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_ratings_over_time" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the song */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_over_time_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
